step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for the entire overhead flat-lay scene — the white marble counter with grey veining, the ceramic dish of cotton pads at upper-left, the amber-glass dropper bottle at upper-right, the clear glass tumbler of water at the right edge, the folded white washcloth at lower-left, the dried lavender bundle draping across the lower edge, and the thin gold-handled facial roller at lower-right — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. Place the Alluvi product at the center-right of the composition in the empty negative space on the marble, oriented horizontally with its long side parallel to the lower edge of the frame, front face up to the camera, nestled symmetrically among the surrounding items. The product is approximately 7 inches wide and 3 inches tall, sized realistically relative to the dropper bottle, cotton pads dish, and tumbler around it. Do not enlarge the product beyond its actual proportions. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color — only apply the scene's directional lighting on top, do not tint the white to match the warm marble cast. Match the lighting direction of the scene: soft natural daylight from above, very gentle diffuse shadows cast outward from each object, warm bone tones across the marble, subtle warm glow.
